source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/02_CYAN/2. DMR/06. MCU Firmware/CYAN FW 업로드 가이드(IMX)_20260513.pptx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Internal confidential guide for iMX8 firmware installation covering Linux Yocto installation and Gen2.Server installation.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used by DR 개발팀 personnel to install Yocto and upload Gen2.Server firmware using SD card boot, UART/Teraterm, Engineering Tool, and network setup steps.
keyPoints: The guide lists two main sections: 리눅스 Yocto 설치 and Gen2.Server 설치.
Yocto installation uses an iMX8 Module card, UART to Micro 5-pin cable, and boot Micro SD card.
UART/Teraterm settings include speed 115200 and data 8bit.
Gen2.Server installation requires the IMX module mounted in the detector and connection between detector and PC.
If Engineering Tool Setup Page Ping is not green, IPv4 is configured to IP address 192.168.0.100 and subnet mask 255.255.255.0.
Upload completion is indicated by Setup done. log and State showing green light with Idle after Connect.

entities.name: Teraterm
entities.evidence: PC 에서 UART 통신을 위한 Teraterm 을 실행한다

entities.name: Bule Engineering Tool
entities.evidence: Bule Engineering Tool 디텍터와 PC 간의 연결 필수

entities.name: Engineering Tool Setup Page
entities.evidence: Engineering Tool Setup Page Ping 칸에 초록불이 들어오면 부팅 완료

concepts.name: Gen2.Server 설치
concepts.evidence: 목차 1. 리눅스 Yocto 설치 2. Gen2.Server 설치

concepts.name: SD CARD 부팅모드
concepts.evidence: 지정된 DIP 스위치를 SD CARD 부팅모드로 올린다

concepts.name: UART 통신 설정
concepts.evidence: 설정 포트 : UART 컴포트 ( 장치관리자에서 확인 ) 속도 : 115200 데이터 : 8bit

concepts.name: Engineering Tool Ping 확인
concepts.evidence: Engineering Tool Setup Page Ping 칸에 초록불이 들어오면 부팅 완료

evidence.claim: The document is titled IMX firmware installation guide and dated 2026. 05. 13.
evidence.evidenceText: IMX 펌웨어 설치 가이드 일자 - 2026. 05. 13 부서 - DR 개발팀
IMX 펌웨어 설치 가이드 일자 - 2026. 05. 13 부서 - DR 개발팀 <confidential>

evidence.claim: The guide covers Linux Yocto installation and Gen2.Server installation.
evidence.evidenceText: 목차 1. 리눅스 Yocto 설치 2. Gen2.Server 설치

evidence.claim: Yocto installation configuration includes an iMX8 Module card, UART to Micro 5-pin cable, and boot Micro SD card.
evidence.evidenceText: 리눅스 Yocto 설치 - 구성 iMX8 Module card UART to Micro 5-pin cable 부팅용 Micro SD card

evidence.claim: The main board DIP switch is set to SD CARD boot mode for installation.
evidence.evidenceText: IMX 모듈이 장착된 MAIN B/D 의 지정된 DIP 스위치를 SD CARD 부팅모드로 올린다

evidence.claim: Teraterm is used for UART communication with serial port settings.
evidence.evidenceText: PC 에서 UART 통신을 위한 Teraterm 을 실행한다 . 실행 후 Serialport 를 연결한다 .

evidence.claim: UART settings include speed 115200 and data 8bit.
evidence.evidenceText: 설정 포트 : UART 컴포트 ( 장치관리자에서 확인 ) 속도 : 115200 데이터 : 8bit

evidence.claim: After boot completion, login is performed by entering root.
The Yocto download and installation command is /usr/bin/install_yocto.sh.
Yocto installation completion is indicated by the message Yocto installed successfully.
evidence.evidenceText: 다운로드 이후 ' Yocto installed successfully' 메시지 출력 시 설치 완료

evidence.claim: Gen2.Server installation requires the IMX module installed in the detector and a connection between detector and PC.
evidence.evidenceText: Gen2.Server 설치 - 구성 디텍터에 IMX 모듈 장착 완료 상태확인 Bule Engineering Tool 디텍터와 PC 간의 연결 필수

evidence.claim: After Yocto installation, the changed DIP switch is restored and the SD card is removed before powering on.
evidence.evidenceText: 리눅스 설치를위해 변경한 DIP 스위치를 원상태로 복구한다 2. SD CARD 를 제거 후 전원을 켠다 .

evidence.claim: Boot completion is indicated when the Engineering Tool Setup Page Ping field turns green.
evidence.evidenceText: Engineering Tool Setup Page Ping 칸에 초록불이 들어오면 부팅 완료

evidence.claim: If Ping is not green, Windows IPv4 settings are changed from automatic IP to a specified IP address.
evidence.evidenceText: ‘자동으로 IP 주소 받기’ 를 ‘다음 IP 주소 사용‘ 으로 변경

evidence.claim: When Setup is clicked, file transfer progress appears in the lower log and upload completion outputs Setup done.
evidence.evidenceText: Setup 버튼을 클릭하면 아래쪽 로그에 파일 전송 진행 상황이 표시되며 , 업로드가 완료되면 Setup done. 로그가 출력됨 .

evidence.claim: Upload completion is confirmed when Connect shows State green and Idle.
evidence.evidenceText: Connect 버튼을 눌러 연결하였을 때 상단 State 에 초록 불이 들어오고 Idle 이 표시되면 업로드 완료 .

reviewFlags.reason: No revision or version identifier is present in the source text.
No regulatory authority, jurisdiction, or external standard is identified; authority is limited to the internal DR 개발팀 department.
No RA/regulatory standards are cited in the source text.
Source contains possible OCR or spelling inconsistencies such as BULE_BASE and Bule Engineering Tool; values were preserved as written.
